text:
(linking from provider base to the provider Location and provider License files via the 
CCW_APR_LINK_KEY and the PRVDR_LCTN_ID). 
SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_LCNS_ACRDTN 
LONG NAME: SPLMTL_LCNS_ACRDTN 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
The CCW_APR_LINK_KEY identifies each unique combination of submitting state entity code 
(SUBMTG_STATE_CD) and state-specific provider identifier (SUBMTG_STATE_PRVDR_ID). 
^ Back to TOC ^
